toolbox.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Fields
toolbox.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Drag and drop, or select and double click, to place fields on the Document.
toolbox.signaturetooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Use this field to collect Signatures from Participants
toolbox.autosigntooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Auto-Sign lets Senders add a Signature to the Document that will be automatically applied upon Sending
toolbox.texttooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] A field for collecting any plain text values such as: names, addresses or descriptions
toolbox.signingdatetooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Automatically inserts the date upon completion by the assigned Participant
toolbox.datetooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] A field for collecting dates with built-in date formatting options
toolbox.emailtooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] A Field to only accept entries formatted as an email address (e.g., example@example.com)
toolbox.initialstooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Use this field anywhere Participants are required to Initial your document
toolbox.numbertooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] A Field to only accept entries in numerical format. Additional validations include character limit (1 to 12 digits), and currency format (2 decimal places)
toolbox.dropdowntooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Use this field to create custom dropdown menus in your document, or place one of our handy presets for countries or prefixes
toolbox.checkboxtooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Places a checkbox on your document. Handy for T&Cs or  ✔/✗ sections
toolbox.regextooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Need a specific validation? Use this field to enter a custom RegEx and have Participants enter exactly what you need
toolbox.imagetooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Use when you need Participants to upload their own images during the signing process
toolbox.filetooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Use when you need Participants to upload their own documents during the signing process
toolbox.drawntooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Allow users to draw on the document using their mouse or touchscreen

featurecolumn.templatedetailstooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] View and edit Template properties
featurecolumn.fieldtypestooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Select and place Form Field Elements
featurecolumn.participantstooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Manage Signers, Witnesses and Approvers
featurecolumn.recipientstooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] View the list of Recipients for this document
featurecolumn.validationtooltip: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] View the list of validation issues for this document

participants.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Participants
participants.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Select and Click to place Signature fields where you'd like on the Document.

recipients.title: Destinatarios y campos
recipients.description: Selecciona Destinatario para expandirlo y arrastra para colocar los campos de firma donde quieres que firmen.
recipients.recipientfieldsdescription: Seleccione y haga clic para colocar los campos de firma en cualquier parte del documento.

documentoptions.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Template Details
documentoptions.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Details and insights about the Template.
documentoptions.name: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Name
documentoptions.autoarchivedescription: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] After Sending the Template will be automatically archived.
documentoptions.locktemplatedescription: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Lock Template to avoid changes being made
documentoptions.fixedsignatureaspectdescription: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Fixes the aspect ratio of all signatures on the document

validation.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] This document needs fields added or corrected before it can be sent.
validation.recipientneedsignature: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Recipient needs a Signature Field

viewer.autherrormessage: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Unable to load template. Please check your access token is valid and try again.

fieldproperties.fieldorderdescription: Determina qué campos de pedido rellenará el usuario
fieldproperties.linktypedescription: Determina de qué manera este campo está vinculado a otros campos
fieldproperties.linkvaluedescription: Los campos con el mismo valor de enlace se vincularán entre sí
fieldproperties.fieldtypedescription: El campo que ha seleccionado actualmente
fieldproperties.fieldlabeldescription: Agregue una etiqueta para aclarar la información requerida del destinatario.
fieldproperties.valuedescription: Un valor rellenado previamente que el firmante puede modificar.
fieldproperties.optionsdescription: Defina las opciones disponibles en el menú desplegable. Una opción por línea.
fieldproperties.contentformatdescription: Selecciona el formato específico que deseas que introduzca el destinatario.

alignment.selectmultipledistribution: Seleccione varios campos para acceder a los controles de distribución
alignment.selectmultiplescale: Seleccione varios campos para acceder a los controles de escala
alignment.selectmultiplewidth: Seleccione varios campos para acceder a los controles de ancho de coincidencia
alignment.selectmultipleheight: Seleccione varios campos para acceder a los controles de altura coincidentes
alignment.matchsize: Hacer que los campos seleccionados tengan la misma altura y ancho que el primer campo seleccionado
alignment.matchwidth: Hacer que los campos seleccionados tengan el mismo ancho que el primer campo seleccionado
alignment.matchheight: Hacer que los campos seleccionados tengan la misma altura que el primer campo seleccionado
